arts.sum: Fiorentina have provided a positive update on the condition of midfielder Edoardo Bove, who collapsed during Sunday's Serie A match against Inter Milan. The post Fiorentina midfielder Edoardo Bove recovering after on-field collapse appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Fiorentina Provide an Encouraging Update on Bove
arts.sum: Edoardo Bove is out of the woods, although it’s uncertain what caused him to go into cardiac arrest during Sunday’s match versus Inter at this point. He’s recovering at the Careggi hospital: "He's vigil and oriented." The post Fiorentina Provide an Encouraging Update on Bove appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
